requiredAssertions: Review step shows selected reason and date before submit
Successful submit is detected by response or accepted UI state
Leave balance is captured before suite execution and is lower after all successful submissions
codegenHints.executionMode: serial when tests mutate a shared employee leave balance

gherkinPreview:
Feature: Completed 26 pairwise regression tests for the Employee absence creation flow, logged in to the teacher account (username staffuser210@mailinator.com, password [redacted]). All 26 tests passe
  Ticket: ISE-1559
  Priority: Medium

  Background:
    Given the administrator is on the Employee absence creation flow
    And the target employee is selected

  Scenario: T1 - Employee absence Sick / Full Day / Notify all subs
    Given the absence date is "Jan 1, 2027"
    And the absence reason is "Sick"
    And the duration is "Full Day"
    And the substitute preference is "Notify all subs"
    When the employee absence is submitted
    Then the test result should be "(/) PASS"

  Scenario: T2 - Employee absence Personal / Full Day / Notify 1 Sub
    Given the absence date is "Jan 2, 2027"
    And the absence reason is "Personal"
    And the duration is "Full Day"
    And the substitute preference is "Notify 1 Sub"
    And the substitute selected is "Sub 2"
    When the employee absence is submitted
    Then the test result should be "(/) PASS"

  Scenario: T3 - Employee absence Vacation / Full Day / Notify my favorites
    Given the absence date is "Jan 3, 2027"
    And the absence reason is "Vacation"
    And the duration is "Full Day"
    And the substitute preference is "Notify my favorites"
    When the employee absence is submitted
    Then the test result should be "(/) PASS"

  Scenario: T4 - Employee absence Illness-Family Member / Full Day / Assign a specific sub
    Given the absence date is "Jan 4, 2027"
    And the absence reason is "Illness-Family Member"
    And the duration is "Full Day"
    And the substitute preference is "Assign a specific sub"
    And the substitute selected is "Sub 2"
    When the employee absence is submitted

riskMatrix.mitigation: Add retry logic, increase wait times
